
  parameter HALF_CLOCK_PERIOD = 2;
  parameter CLOCK_PERIOD = HALF_CLOCK_PERIOD * 2;

  // clock
  always begin
      ap_clk = 1'b0;
      #HALF_CLOCK_PERIOD;
      ap_clk = 1'b1;
      #HALF_CLOCK_PERIOD;
  end

  // fifo signals
  always @(posedge ap_clk) begin
    if (kernel_started) begin


    tapa::istream(
        fifo_a_s_data_unpacked_next,
        fifo_a_s_valid_next,
        fifo_a_s_ready,
        "a_s"
    );

    fifo_a_s_data_unpacked <=
        fifo_a_s_data_unpacked_next;
    fifo_a_s_valid <= fifo_a_s_valid_next;



    tapa::ostream(
        fifo_b_s_data_unpacked,
        fifo_b_s_ready_next,
        fifo_b_s_valid,
        "b_s"
    );

    fifo_b_s_ready <= fifo_b_s_ready_next;


    end
    if (ap_done) begin
      kernel_done <= 1'b1;
    end
    if (ap_ready) begin
      ap_start <= 1'b0;
    end
  end



    assign fifo_a_s_data =
        packed_uint33_t'(
            fifo_a_s_data_unpacked);



    assign fifo_b_s_data_unpacked =
        unpacked_uint65_t'(fifo_b_s_data);



  initial begin
    // reset the DUT
    ap_rst_n = 1'b0;
    #(CLOCK_PERIOD*1000);

    // enable the DUT
    ap_rst_n = 1'b1;
    #(CLOCK_PERIOD*100);

    // start the DUT
    ap_start <= 1'b1;
    @(posedge ap_clk);

    kernel_started <= 1;
    @(posedge ap_clk);

    wait(kernel_done);


    axi_ram_mem_dump_mem <= 1;


    #(CLOCK_PERIOD*100);
    $finish;
  end
